_comment: EDGE CASE: frequency=iterative — this scene encodes a repeated habitual pattern, not a single event. The scene_turns describe the generic form of an event that recurs regularly, not one specific instance.

canonical_summary.want: sam wants the routine to be enough
canonical_summary.delta: The routine holds, and in holding it enacts the stasis that will eventually break. (Iterative: this is the world before the inciting incident.)

observables.target: the same sequence of objects — kettle, mug, chair, window

interpretations.result: the routine completes; the emptiness remains unchanged

observables.target: the awareness that nothing will be different today either
